positive: A whimsical, symmetrical composition featuring a stylized portrait of a mystical, forest-dwelling animal (like a fox or a raven) integrated with delicate, hand-drawn botanical elements. The style should be modern vintage botanical etching mixed with clean graphic illustration. The animal should have a powerful, elegant silhouette, surrounded by stylized ferns, glowing mushrooms, and entwined vines. Focus on strong, single-color contrast (e.g., deep indigo and warm gold leaf accents) against a crisp white or cream background. The composition must be centrally balanced, suitable for repeat or apparel printing, with clear lines and high contrast for screen printing effect. Minimalist, highly detailed, clean linework.
negative: blurry, low resolution, fuzzy, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, messy, ugly, bad anatomy, cropped, extra limbs, noise, grainy
